response.global_summary: The video is a 3D birthday live performance. It begins with an introduction and dialogue by the VTuber models Anya Melfissa and Ouro Kronii. This is followed by their performance of the song "愛包ダンスホール" (Ai-Pai Dance Hall).

scenes.description: Introduction and dialogue by Anya Melfissa and Ouro Kronii on a 3D stage setup.
Anya Melfissa and Ouro Kronii perform the song '愛包ダンスホール'. Text on screen identifies the song and credits.
